definition: To make something less severe or harmful
example_sentence: We need to mitigate the risks associated with this project.

definition: The income that a government or company receives regularly
example_sentence: The company's revenue increased by 20% last quarter.

definition: To start using a plan or system

definition: To use something that you already have in order to achieve something new or better
example_sentence: We can leverage our existing network to find new clients.

definition: A person or group that has an investment or interest in a business

definition: A detailed plan or route of a journey
example_sentence: The tour operator will provide you with an itinerary and flight tickets.

definition: A room or building in which someone may live or stay

definition: A set of mathematical instructions or rules
